title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF CALATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SANDOVAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4681 / 52 OG No. 9, 4207 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1526, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF CALATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SANDOVAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Calatan in the Municipality of Taytay, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as Barrio Sandoval.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
